25:29 â December 16, 2025
Update to the 2-Step Security Part
We substantively edited the Part and made the following specific updates:
Access and Administration Volume
2-Step Security Part
Section 1.2, Contacts, Websites, and Other Resources
Added contact information for Hypersecu.
Section 2.1, Definitions
Added a definition for Client Centre Users and updated definition for User Management Security Officers.
Section 3.1, Ordering Hard Tokens
Edited the login procedures and ServiceNow images.
Section 4.2, Registering a Soft Token
Updated the registration procedures and images.
Section 4.3, Replacing a Soft Token
New section.
Questions
